_comment: Parity contract for the WL-derived formula. base_xp = sum(eff_xp[difficulty][sid] for sid in cleared). The `traits` held count is capped by the greedy harness gate: the k-th trait counts only if level_from_xp(base_xp*trait_multiplier[k-1]) >= trait_min_wl[k]; wl = level_from_xp(base_xp * trait_multiplier[eff]). The mod MUST reproduce every `wl`.
formula: greedy: eff = max n<=traits s.t. each step level_from_xp(base*mult[k-1]) >= min_wl[k]; wl = level_from_xp(base * trait_multiplier[eff])
